data.description: Array of event documents. Each event is rendered as a timeline item. Expected fields: type, title, description (optional), info (optional), created.user, created.timestamp, actions (optional), files (optional).

eventTypeConfig.description: Map of event type → display metadata (color, icon, title, card_color, border_color). Used to style the timeline dot, icon, and card per event type.

actionStatusConfig.description: Map of action status → display metadata (color, title, card_color, border_color). Used to render action status badges within events.

s3GetPolicyRequestId.description: Request ID for S3 file download policy. When provided, events with a files array render an attachment list.

contactPageUrl.description: URL template for linking the avatar and timestamp of each event to the actor's contact page. Use {id} as a placeholder for the user id; if omitted, the id is appended as ?_id=<id>. Example: '/contacts/view?_id={id}'.

disableContactLink.description: Opt out of contact-page wrapping for the avatar and timestamp.

compact.description: Render smaller avatars and tighter padding. Adds an 'events-timeline-compact' class on the root for additional dense styling.

reverse.description: Reverse the order of events in the timeline.

mode.description: AntD Timeline mode controlling which side timeline items render on.
